title: Irresistibly Crunchy Egyptian Fennel Flatbread
description: A yeasty, crunchy Egyptian flatbread featuring caramelized fennel, perfect for midnight cravings, and is dairy-free friendly, served in a scallop shell vessel.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add olive oil and water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Let the dough rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
Roll out the dough into a thin sheet, about 1/4 inch thick.
Caramelize the sliced fennel in a pan with a little olive oil over medium heat.
Spread the caramelized fennel over the dough, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the dough over the fennel to form a crust.
Brush the crust with lemon juice and bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
